title: Colour Coding According to Value

posts.author: kstirzaker (Kevin Stirzaker)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, please consider me to be a technical dullard but I am doing my best. I have created two columns making calculations based on two other columns. I then have a further column generating a numerical score based on said calculations. Does anybody know how I can change the colour of the box according to the value (say 10 - Red, 6 = Orange, 3 = Green). Any help will be humbly accepted.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
See if you can achieve your goal using the Conditional Coloring feature

Support

Conditional Coloring

3 min read Feature   With conditional coloring, you can easily apply coloring to cells that meet your defined criteria to visually emphasize or differentiate among the data on your board. This ...

posts.author: kstirzaker (Kevin Stirzaker)
posts.cookedHtml: One more question: How can I calculate if a value is between two values: Say is it any value between 7 & 15?
